title: go.sum file not present in archive
evidence: ls of run directory shows no go.sum — only go.mod exists. Build succeeded per retort scorer (defect_rate=1.0) so go.sum was likely generated at build time but not archived.
suggestion: Archive go.sum alongside go.mod for reproducible builds

title: No .beads/ tracking directory despite tooling=beads
evidence: ls -a of run directory shows no .beads/ directory. The agent had beads tooling enabled but did not create a .beads tracking directory.
suggestion: Agent may not have used bd commands during this run
